chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Appeal No.S- 193 of 2018 Criminal Appeal No.S- 194 of 2018 Criminal Jail Appeal No.S- 180 of 2018 Criminal Jail Appeal No.S- 181 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.11.2025. Ms. Sana Memon, A.P.G for State. = It appears that appellant Misri s/o Khuda Dino has also preferred Criminal Appeal No.S-193/2018 (in main case) and 194/2018 (in offshoot case) through his counsel against the same judgment pertaining to same crime including the offshoot case, which has been admitted for regular hearing. Since the Criminal Jail Appeals No.S-180 and 181 of 2018 have been superseded by Criminal Appeals No.S-193 and 194 of 2018 hence the Criminal Jail Appeals No.S-180 and 181 of 2018 are hereby dismissed as having become infructuous. Vide order dated 21.10.2025 this bench had asked the appellant in these appeals whether he wishes to engage a counsel of his own choice or have a counsel appointed for him on State expenses. I have received the reply of appellant through Superintendent Central Prison, Hyderabad which states that he is a poor person and requests for appointment of a counsel on State expenses. Accordingly, I hereby appoint Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate to represent the appellant in both Criminal Appeals No.193 and 194/2018 on State expenses. His fee is fixed at Rs.40,000/- (Rupees forty thousand) which shall be paid to him by the office of Prosecutor General, Sindh. It is noted that paper book has already been prepared which shall be provided to Mr. Keerio by the office free of cost and he is directed to come prepared on the next date of hearing to argue the matter.

It is noted that paper book has already been prepared which shall be provided to Mr. Keerio by the office free of cost and he is directed to come prepared on the next date of hearing to argue the matter. A copy of this order shall be sent to Mr. Keerio, Advocate and the office of Prosecutor General, Sindh for compliance. Meanwhile, notice may also be issued to the complainant through SHO concerned. Office to tag the disposed of Criminal Jail Appeal Nos.180 & 181/2028 with the two current appeals. To come up after four weeks. JUDGE Tufail
